# function: lookup

Looks up a key in a map. If the key is not present, it returns the provided default value.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
lookup(key string, input_map map of string, default_value string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `key` (String) The key to look up in the map.
1. `input_map` (Map of String) The map to look up the key in.
1. `default_value` (String) The fallback value if the key is not found.
